title: Cozy Velvety Butter Sherry Vinegar Dish
description: A comforting and velvety Polish dish featuring butter, sherry vinegar, and a touch of garlic for a perfect addition to any meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup low-sodium chicken or vegetable broth
1 teaspoon Dijon mustard
ingredients.notes: optional, to enhance the flavor profile

ingredients.name: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Pour in the heavy cream, then gradually add the sherry vinegar while continuously stirring to prevent lumps from forming. Let it simmer gently for about 5 minutes.
If using Dijon mustard, whisk it into the sauce now and let it cook for an additional minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Season with salt and pepper as needed. Serve immediately or warm through before serving.
